ModMetaData.name: Waymakers (Roads, Rails & Infrastructure Meme)
ModMetaData.author: Mxswat
ModMetaData.description:
The prosperity of civilization depends on connection. Roads, railways, and commerce bind isolated peoples together and allow knowledge and culture to flourish. To create paths is a noble calling.
Adds the Waymakers meme with the Surveyor specialist role, Coordinate Works ability, and rituals celebrating infrastructure.
Icons by Nekl.

li.displayName: Rails and Roads of the Rim (Continued)
